notes: Built from the LocalLink Phase 1 PRD.
Used the tech-utility direction for a local developer control plane.
Focused the preview on service health, port allocation, log streaming, PWA readiness, and MCP tools.
transformations: Condensed the PRD into a dashboard-oriented service matrix, terminal log view, and port allocator.
Kept the preview local-first and omitted any secrets, raw logs, or machine-specific absolute paths.
Designed responsive desktop and mobile behavior around the same single dashboard surface.
